_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the freezr browser/job API client files. Consumed by adapters/rendering/pageLoader.mjs (browser <script> injection), common/helpers/sdkAddons.mjs (permission->addon detection), and adapters/jobs/jobFreezrClient.mjs (node vm load). Add a new addon here and all three pick it up. Files live at freezrsystmapps/info.freezr.public/public/ (served at publicAppRoute).
